results.name: The Equalizer
results.overview: Robert McCall is a former agent of a secret government agency who is now running his own private crime fighting operation where he fashions himself as "The Equalizer." It is a service for victims of the system who have exhausted all possible means of seeking justice and have nowhere to go. McCall promises to even out the odds for them.

results.name: The Equalizer
results.overview: Robyn McCall, an enigmatic former CIA operative with a mysterious background, uses her extensive skills to help those with nowhere else to turn.

McCall believes he has put his mysterious past behind him and dedicated himself to beginning a new, quiet life. But when he meets Teri, a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters, he can’t stand idly by – he has to help her. Armed with hidden skills that allow him to serve vengeance against anyone who would brutalize the helpless, McCall comes out of his self-imposed retirement and finds his desire for justice reawakened. If someone has a problem, if the odds are stacked against them, if they have nowhere else to turn, McCall will help. He is The Equalizer.
results.title: The Equalizer

results.overview: Virtual competition of athletes from the past and present.
results.title: The Equalizer

results.overview: Robert McCall finds himself at home in Southern Italy but he discovers his friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall knows what he has to do: become his friends' protector by taking on the mafia.
results.title: The Equalizer 3

results.overview: Robert McCall, who serves an unflinching justice for the exploited and oppressed, embarks on a relentless, globe-trotting quest for vengeance when his former partner is murdered.
results.title: The Equalizer 2

results.original_title: The Equalizer - The Movie: Blood & Wine
results.overview: Robert McCall is forced to work with a former terrorist turned monk by the name of Joseph Heiden(Telly Savalas), whom he despises and mistrusts, on a deadly mission in New York.
results.title: The Equalizer - The Movie: Blood & Wine

results.name: Alex Morgan: The Equalizer
results.overview: Behind-the-scenes look at Alex Morgan and her fellow teammates who are paving the way for the generations of female athletes who will follow their lead.

Dong-ho is ranked number 1 in "Arena," an illegal gambling league for teens, but he steps down to prepare for college. However, the members of "Arena" don't want to lose their biggest money-maker, so they place a debt on his brother Dong-min. Dong-min literally fights against his debt, but when he gets hurt, Dong-ho decides to fight back.
results.title: Equality Before the Violence

results.original_title: エクスタシー・イコライザーREN 妖艶美女が溺れるキケンな恍惚
results.overview: One day, Kyosuke, a former athlete and lover, appears before spending time as an Olympic athlete and now as a chaste wife of Akio, a politician. Love burns again with him who lives as a gunman in a corner of the underworld, but Kyosuke is brutally killed. I feel sorry for chasing the mystery of his death with his left handgun, but behind it, the darkness of the huge underworld and the secret of my husband's black relationship were hidden
results.title: Ecstasy Equalizer Ren

results.overview: Chi Kuan Chun (Shaolin Temple, Men from the Monastery) trains with the White Haired Scholar in the Beggar Style of Kung Fu. His training is amazing, his duels are legendary!
results.title: Beggars Have No Equal

results.name: More than or Equal to 75 Celsius
results.overview: Jae Eun Hong, the winner of an annual Winter Menu Tea Sommelier competition held by ALTDIF (a popular tea café franchise), is the tea master of their Hongdae branch location. She has to collaborate with Song Ju Cha, ALTDIF’s corporate marketing manager, to create a new winter tea course menu. However, the two are in regular conflict and disagreement over how the menu should be constructed. Will their working relationship lead to something more?
An omnibus film on children's rights and the problems that the youngest members of our society have to face. Each story tackles a specific theme and has its own hero.
results.title: Equals

results.overview: In the parallel universe, compared to our universe, there are exactly the same people. Yan Alai from the parallel universe came to our universe after the death of her boyfriend Ye Xinghe. While looking for another Ye Xinghe, she accidentally encountered herself killed in this universe.
results.title: Equal and Universe Love

results.overview: Peter is in his early forties and until recently he worked in a factory, but after Slovenia's integration into the European Union, the factory closed down and Peter and his colleagues have been made redundant. Slowly but surely, he is losing self-confidence and self-esteem.
results.title: Labour Equals Freedom

results.original_title: 渇いた花　～four by four equal one ～
results.overview: The title is "Thirsty Flower ~ four by four equal one ~", which is a short story of about 60 minutes with four women as the main characters.
results.title: The Thirsty Flower: Four by Four Equals One

results.name: Equalizer
results.overview: After twists and turns, Bong-su, holding Kyung-hoon's cell phone in his hand, learns a big secret.
The Daughters of Equality want everybody to be like them...
results.title: Daughters of Equality

results.original_title: Albastru si rosu, in proportii egale
results.overview: On the day of her first anniversary with Ștefan, Ana offers him an unexpected present – she agrees to be surrogate mother for the baby Ștefan cannot have with his wife. In the end, Ștefan realizes that he wants something else, but it is far too late.
results.title: Equally Red and Blue

results.overview: Equal is a two-hander Korean musical based on the Japanese stage play of the same name by Kenichi Suemitsu. The musical’s book and lyrics are by Soovin Kim, with music by Woody Pak.[1]  The musical is set in 17th century Europe, during the Black Death pandemic. The story takes place over a week and follows the attempts of Theo, a country doctor, to find a cure for the mysterious illness that is killing his best friend Nicola.[2]  Equal held its first theatrical run from December 31, 2021 to February 20, 2022 at Uniplex Hall 1 in Seoul, South Korea.[3] A second Seoul production ran from June 3, 2022 to July 24, 2022, also at Uniplex Hall 1. A number of the 2022 Seoul cast reprised their roles in Equal's first Japanese production, which ran from August 4, 2022 to August 14, 2022 at Tokyo's Hulic Hall.
results.title: Equal
